strengths: 17+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-performance distributed systems, meeting the experience threshold
Genuine entrepreneurial track record via founding GISCollective and shipping multiple open-source projects, aligning with the preferred startup-within-larger-org profile
Recent direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling, showing current relevance to the AI focus area
concerns: Current and historical titles peak at Staff/Senior Software Developer — no demonstrated director-level IC scope, cross-org influence, or strategic advisory experience the role requires
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or a related field, and no published research, recognized platform, or customer-facing AI product at meaningful scale
AI involvement is shallow and very recent (one role, ~1 year); the role demands recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms, which the resume does not substantiate

key_factors.factor: Lack of deep AI specialization or credentialing
Entrepreneurial and open-source builder track record

response.justification: James Smith is a seasoned generalist engineer with the required years of experience and a genuine builder mindset evidenced by open-source projects and a founded company, but the profile falls significantly short of the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) bar: the career trajectory has not progressed beyond senior/staff individual contribution, there is no evidence of director-level technical leadership or strategic customer advisory work, and AI expertise appears only as a recent, narrow addition rather than a core specialization — making it unlikely he could credibly advise enterprises on cutting-edge AI adoption or drive organizational AI strategy at the required level.
